_note: VERIFY all rates against current SC statute/local practice before build. Values are best-known seed.

attorney_closing_fee.note: SC requires attorney-supervised closing (Matrix rulings). Seller's side.

deed_recording_fee.note: County Register of Deeds; confirm per-page.

sc_transfer_tax.note: SC deed recording fee/transfer tax ~ $1.85 per $500 (state $1.30 + county $0.55). VERIFY current rate.

title_insurance_owner.note: Owner's policy custom varies; often buyer or negotiated. Model as optional seller cost.

property_tax_proration.note: SC assessment ratio: 4% owner-occupied legal residence, 6% other. Choose by assessment status. Prorate with county millage.

cl100_termite_letter.note: Wood-infestation report. Common in SC, esp. FHA/VA. Crawlspace moisture raises risk.

hoa_estoppel_transfer.note: Ask whether the property has an HOA. If so, confirm the estoppel/transfer fee with the seller or the HOA. Do not assume an HOA exists.

seller_concession.note: Modeled as alternative to repair where credit is the better path.

carrying_costs_monthly.note: Applied across estimated DOM. Vacant-home utilities included.

permits.note: Per-jurisdiction. Flag which recommended work needs a permit; unpermitted past work can surface at closing/disclosure. Static per-jurisdiction reference (TODO).
